CL-01.title: Website Security Certificate
CL-01.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, exposing user data to security risks.
CL-01.remediation: Install and configure a valid SSL certificate to encrypt the data transmitted between the user and the server.

CL-11.title: Password Security
CL-11.description: The website allows weak password creation without enforced security measures, making it vulnerable to brute force attacks.
CL-11.remediation: Implement password strength requirements and enable multi-factor authentication for enhanced security.

CL-20.title: GDPR Compliance
CL-20.description: The website lacks a GDPR compliance statement and explicit user consent mechanisms for data processing.
CL-20.remediation: Implement GDPR-compliant privacy policies, cookie consent, and data processing notifications.

CL-01.title: Website Security Certificate
CL-01.description: Ensure that the website has a valid security certificate to protect user data
CL-01.remediation: Make sure that the SSL certificate is up-to-date and valid

CL-02.title: Two-Factor Authentication
CL-02.description: Implement two-factor authentication for added security
CL-02.remediation: Introduce two-factor authentication to improve user account security

CL-03.title: Enable Content Security Policy (CSP)
CL-03.description: Implement Content Security Policy to mitigate risks associated with content injection attacks.

CL-04.title: Conduct Regular Security Audits
CL-04.description: Regularly audit the website for security vulnerabilities and address them promptly.
CL-04.remediation: Implement a routine security audit schedule.

CL-01.title: HTTPS Protocol
CL-01.description: Ensure the website uses HTTPS protocol to encrypt data transmission.

CL-02.title: Data Encryption
CL-02.description: Ensure all sensitive data is encrypted to protect user information.

CL-03.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Protection
CL-03.description: Implement measures to prevent cross-site scripting attacks.

CL-04.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
CL-04.description: Enforce a robust Content Security Policy to mitigate risks of unauthorized content injection.

CL-05.title: Two-Factor Authentication
CL-05.description: Offer two-factor authentication for enhanced account security.

CL-8A6E87.title: Use of SSL/TLS Encryption
CL-8A6E87.description: Ensure that sensitive information is transmitted securely over HTTPS.

CL-90088A.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Prevention
CL-90088A.description: Protect against XSS attacks by sanitizing user input and encoding output.

CL-B38A34.title: 2FA for Account Security
CL-B38A34.description: Encourage or enforce two-factor authentication to enhance user account security.
CL-B38A34.remediation: Prompt users to enable 2FA and provide clear instructions on how to set it up.

CL-308677.title: HTTPS Usage
CL-308677.description: The website is not using HTTPS to encrypt data transmitted between the server and the user's browser, which may expose sensitive information to interception.
CL-308677.remediation: Implement HTTPS by obtaining an SSL certificate and configuring the server to serve content over HTTPS.

CL-9A8AA8.title: Cookie Consent
CL-9A8AA8.description: The website does not provide clear information to users about the use of cookies and obtain explicit consent for cookie usage.
CL-9A8AA8.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner that informs users about the use of cookies and allows them to accept or decline cookies.

CL-08CF7E.title: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
CL-08CF7E.description: The website provides links to Terms of Service and Privacy Policy pages, outlining user rights and data handling practices.

CL-2F14D5.title: SSL Certificate
CL-2F14D5.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, which can put user data at risk.
CL-2F14D5.remediation: Obtain and install a valid SSL certificate to ensure all data transmitted through the website is encrypted.

CL-CA0F9A.title: Privacy Policy
CL-CA0F9A.description: The website has a clear and accessible privacy policy that outlines how user data is collected, used, and protected.
CL-CA0F9A.remediation: Regularly review and update the privacy policy to ensure it complies with relevant data protection regulations.

CL-308677.title: HTTPS Usage
CL-308677.description: Some resources on the website are loaded over HTTP instead of HTTPS, leaving them vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks.
CL-308677.remediation: Ensure that all resources are loaded securely over HTTPS to protect user data from interception.

CL-CE02B1.title: SSL Certificate Missing
CL-CE02B1.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, making it vulnerable to security threats.
CL-CE02B1.remediation: Install an SSL certificate to encrypt data transmitted between the user's browser and the website.

CL-55FD48.title: Cookie Policy Missing
CL-55FD48.description: The website does not have a visible cookie policy, which is required for GDPR compliance.
CL-55FD48.remediation: Create and display a cookie policy that informs users about the use of cookies and their consent options.

CL-F32191.title: Outdated CMS
CL-F32191.description: The website appears to be running on an outdated CMS version, potentially exposing it to security vulnerabilities.
CL-F32191.remediation: Update the CMS to the latest version and regularly apply security patches to protect against potential threats.

CL-073395.title: Data Protection
CL-073395.description: Ensure that user data is protected according to data protection laws.
CL-073395.remediation: Regularly review and update data protection policies to comply with regulations.

CL-9A8AA8.title: Cookie Consent
CL-9A8AA8.description: Obtain user consent before placing cookies on their devices.
CL-9A8AA8.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner or pop-up to inform users and obtain their consent.

CL-2F14D5.title: SSL Certificate
CL-2F14D5.description: Secure website data with an SSL certificate.
CL-2F14D5.remediation: Ensure that the SSL certificate is properly installed and configure the website to load over HTTPS.

CL-A8BCA3.title: User Privacy Policy
CL-A8BCA3.description: Have a transparent privacy policy to inform users about data collection and usage.
CL-A8BCA3.remediation: Regularly review and update privacy policy to reflect any changes in data handling practices.

CL-41157D.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
CL-41157D.description: The website does not use SSL/TLS encryption, leaving user data vulnerable to attacks.
CL-41157D.remediation: Implement SSL/TLS encryption to secure data transfers between users and the website server.

CL-9A8AA8.title: Cookie Consent
CL-9A8AA8.description: The website does not display a clear cookie consent notice or provide an option for users to manage cookie preferences.
CL-9A8AA8.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner that informs users about the use of cookies and provides options to manage their cookie settings.

CL-BE506F.title: HTTPS Protocol
CL-BE506F.description: The website is not using HTTPS protocol for secure data transmission.
CL-BE506F.remediation: Implement HTTPS protocol to encrypt data transmitted between the user's browser and the website's server.

CL-F30738.title: Cookie Policy Compliance
CL-F30738.description: The website does not have a visible cookie policy or consent mechanism for user data tracking.
CL-F30738.remediation: Implement a cookie policy banner with options for users to accept or reject cookies based on GDPR guidelines.

CL-17D78A.title: TLS Encryption
CL-17D78A.description: The website does not have TLS encryption implemented.
CL-17D78A.remediation: Implement TLS encryption to secure data transmission by obtaining an SSL certificate.

CL-853B30.title: Form Validation
CL-853B30.description: Form fields on the website lack proper validation, posing a security risk.
CL-853B30.remediation: Implement input validation to prevent malicious data entry and enhance security.

CL-DB0B59.title: Error Handling
CL-DB0B59.description: The website has proper error handling mechanisms in place.
CL-DB0B59.remediation: Regularly test and review error handling processes to address any vulnerabilities.

CL-ACE9AE.title: Missing SSL Certificate
CL-ACE9AE.description: The website does not have an SSL certificate, making the connection between the user's browser and the website vulnerable to interception.
CL-ACE9AE.remediation: Install an SSL certificate to encrypt the data exchanged between the website and users.

CL-BFE003.title: Missing Terms of Service
CL-BFE003.description: The website does not have a clear Terms of Service agreement, potentially leaving the site vulnerable to legal disputes.
CL-BFE003.remediation: Create and prominently display a Terms of Service agreement that outlines the conditions of using the website.

CL-A2683D.title: Cookie Usage Disclaimer
CL-A2683D.description: The website includes a clear disclaimer about the use of cookies, ensuring transparency with users.

CL-2F14D5.title: SSL Certificate
CL-2F14D5.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, which can expose user data to potential security risks.
CL-2F14D5.remediation: Install and configure an SSL certificate to encrypt data transmitted between the website and users' browsers.

CL-9A8AA8.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner that informs users about the use of cookies on the website and allows them to provide consent.

CL-8A6E87.title: Use of SSL/TLS Encryption
CL-8A6E87.description: Ensure all sensitive information is transmitted securely over HTTPS.

CL-914158.title: Anti-Phishing Measures
CL-914158.description: Implement measures to protect users from phishing attacks.
CL-914158.remediation: Regularly educate users, use multi-factor authentication, implement email authentication protocols.

CL-E9E30D.title: Data Privacy Compliance
CL-E9E30D.description: Comply with data privacy regulations and protect user data.

CL-8AB27E.title: SSL/TLS Protocol
CL-8AB27E.description: The website clalbi.co.il does not have SSL/TLS encryption implemented.

CL-9A8AA8.title: Cookie consent
CL-9A8AA8.description: Website has a visible and GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner.

CL-E5CD1B.description: Ensure that personal data is handled securely and in accordance with data protection laws.

CL-3C8CC7.description: Stay up to date with security patches and software updates to mitigate vulnerabilities.

CL-41157D.title: SSL/TLS encryption
CL-41157D.description: The website does not use SSL/TLS encryption, leaving data vulnerable to interception.
CL-41157D.remediation: Implement SSL/TLS encryption to secure data transmission.

CL-2CF2C9.title: Cross-site scripting prevention
CL-2CF2C9.description: The website is vulnerable to cross-site scripting attacks due to lack of input validation.
CL-2CF2C9.remediation: Implement input validation and sanitize user input to prevent cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.

CL-C84DFC.title: Content Security Policy
CL-C84DFC.description: The website does not have a Content Security Policy in place, increasing the risk of malicious script execution.
CL-C84DFC.remediation: Implement a Content Security Policy to prevent unauthorized script execution and protect user data.

CL-2F14D5.title: SSL Certificate
CL-2F14D5.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate which can compromise data security.
CL-2F14D5.remediation: Install an SSL certificate to encrypt data transmitted between the website and users' devices.

CL-9A8AA8.title: Cookie Consent
CL-9A8AA8.description: The website does not have a cookie consent banner, which is required for GDPR compliance.
CL-9A8AA8.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner that allows users to accept or decline cookies.

CL-C84DFC.title: Content Security Policy
CL-C84DFC.description: The website does not have a Content Security Policy (CSP) to protect against various types of attacks.
CL-C84DFC.remediation: Implement a CSP to restrict the origins from which resources can be loaded on the website.

CL-ED92CB.title: HTTP used instead of HTTPS
CL-ED92CB.description: The website is using HTTP instead of HTTPS, which can pose security risks especially when handling sensitive data.
CL-ED92CB.remediation: Implement an SSL certificate to enable HTTPS on the website.

CL-F978AE.title: Lack of two-factor authentication for user accounts
CL-F978AE.description: User accounts on the website do not have two-factor authentication enabled, leaving them vulnerable to unauthorized access.
CL-F978AE.remediation: Implement two-factor authentication for user accounts to enhance security measures.

CL-2F14D5.title: SSL Certificate
CL-2F14D5.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, which may expose user data to security risks.
CL-2F14D5.remediation: Install an SSL certificate to ensure all data transmitted between users and the website is encrypted.

CL-46557B.title: Form Input Validation
CL-46557B.description: The website validates user input on forms to prevent security vulnerabilities like SQL injection and cross-site scripting.

CL-DB0B59.title: Error Handling
CL-DB0B59.description: The website provides informative error messages to users in case of form submission errors or other issues.

CL-9E8710.title: Use of Cookies
CL-9E8710.description: The website does not provide a clear notice about the use of cookies.
CL-9E8710.remediation: Add a cookie consent banner that clearly informs users about the use of cookies and provides an option to accept or manage preferences.

CL-4EB807.title: Secure Connection
CL-4EB807.description: The website is using HTTPS to securely encrypt data transmission.

CL-351C17.title: Data Privacy Policy
CL-351C17.description: The website does not have a visible data privacy policy.
CL-351C17.remediation: Create a comprehensive data privacy policy that outlines how user data is collected, used, and protected on the website.

CL-4EB807.title: Secure Connection
CL-4EB807.description: The website eged.co.il does not use HTTPS encryption, potentially exposing user data to security risks.
CL-4EB807.remediation: Implement an SSL certificate to enable HTTPS encryption for all website pages.

CL-ACE9AE.title: Missing SSL Certificate
CL-ACE9AE.description: The website does not have an SSL certificate, which can lead to security risks, especially when users need to input sensitive information.
CL-ACE9AE.remediation: Install an SSL certificate to enable HTTPS on the website for secure data transfer.

CL-C26B74.title: Missing Privacy Policy
CL-C26B74.description: The website lacks a privacy policy, which is essential to inform users about data collection and usage practices.
CL-C26B74.remediation: Create and publish a comprehensive privacy policy that outlines how user data is collected, stored, and used.

CL-13878A.title: Long Form Fields Without Validation
CL-13878A.description: Some long form fields do not have input validation, leaving the website vulnerable to injection attacks and data manipulation.
CL-13878A.remediation: Implement input validation for all form fields to ensure that only valid and expected data is accepted.

CL-FABC10.title: Mixed content (HTTP and HTTPS)
CL-FABC10.description: The website contains a mix of secure (HTTPS) and non-secure (HTTP) content, which can pose security risks.
CL-FABC10.remediation: Ensure all content is loaded over HTTPS to maintain a secure connection.

CL-C794C9.title: Unsecured forms
CL-C794C9.description: Forms on the website are not secured with SSL encryption, potentially exposing user data to security risks.
CL-C794C9.remediation: Secure all forms with SSL encryption to protect user information during data transmission.

CL-1E132D.title: HTTPS encryption
CL-1E132D.description: The website is not using HTTPS encryption to secure the connection between the user and the server.
CL-1E132D.remediation: Implement HTTPS encryption to ensure data security and protect user information.

CL-2A8A09.title: No privacy policy
CL-2A8A09.description: The website does not have a privacy policy, which is essential for informing users about data collection and usage.
CL-2A8A09.remediation: Create and prominently display a privacy policy that outlines how user data is collected, used, and protected.

CL-A44AEB.title: No automatic timeout for user inactivity
CL-A44AEB.description: The website does not have an automatic timeout feature for user inactivity, which can pose a security risk.
CL-A44AEB.remediation: Implement an automatic timeout mechanism to log out users after a period of inactivity.

CL-E23A7D.title: Missing contact information
CL-E23A7D.description: The website does not have clear contact information, making it difficult for users to reach out for support or inquiries.
CL-E23A7D.remediation: Provide prominent contact information, including email, phone number, or contact form, for users to get in touch.

CL-41157D.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
CL-41157D.description: The website does not use SSL/TLS encryption to secure data in transit, which can expose user information to interception.
CL-41157D.remediation: Implement SSL/TLS encryption to protect user data during transmission by obtaining an SSL certificate and configuring the server to use HTTPS.

CL-78B3DA.title: Secure Login Process
CL-78B3DA.description: Login process does not utilize multi-factor authentication, increasing the risk of unauthorized access.
CL-78B3DA.remediation: Implement multi-factor authentication for the login process to enhance security.

CL-B5491F.title: Encrypted Connections
CL-B5491F.description: The website uses HTTPS to establish encrypted connections, ensuring secure data transmission.

CL-C84DFC.title: Content Security Policy
CL-C84DFC.description: The platform has a well-defined Content Security Policy (CSP) in place to mitigate risks associated with cross-site scripting attacks.

CL-9E8710.title: Use of Cookies
CL-9E8710.description: LinkedIn uses cookies to improve user experience and track user activity.

CL-351C17.title: Data Privacy Policy
CL-351C17.description: LinkedIn has a comprehensive data privacy policy to protect user data.

CL-20FAB2.title: SSL Encryption
CL-20FAB2.description: LinkedIn uses SSL encryption to secure data transmission.

CL-6DFC2B.title: Transparent Data Usage
CL-6DFC2B.description: LinkedIn is transparent about how user data is collected and used.

CL-FABC10.title: Mixed content (HTTP and HTTPS)
CL-FABC10.description: The website loads some resources over HTTP which can pose a security risk by exposing user data to potential attacks.
CL-FABC10.remediation: Ensure all resources are loaded securely over HTTPS to prevent mixed content issues.

CL-F37B58.title: Unsecured third-party integrations
CL-F37B58.description: The website includes unsecured third-party integrations that may expose user data to security risks and vulnerabilities.
CL-F37B58.remediation: Regularly update third-party integrations to the latest secure versions to mitigate potential security threats.

CL-8E041D.title: Inadequate password policy
CL-8E041D.description: The website's password policy may be inadequate, potentially leaving user accounts vulnerable to unauthorized access.
CL-8E041D.remediation: Upgrade the password policy to enforce stronger password requirements and implement additional security measures like multi-factor authentication.

CL-C88B03.title: Use of HTTP instead of HTTPS
CL-C88B03.description: The website is using unsecured HTTP instead of HTTPS for secure communication.
CL-C88B03.remediation: Implement HTTPS to ensure secure data transfer between the users and the website.

CL-31719D.title: Insecure Form Submission
CL-31719D.description: Forms on the website are submitted insecurely, posing a risk to user data.
CL-31719D.remediation: Implement secure form submission protocols such as using HTTPS and encryption.

CL-506178.title: Missing Error Handling
CL-506178.description: The website lacks proper error handling mechanisms, leaving it vulnerable to exploitation.
CL-506178.remediation: Implement robust error handling to prevent security vulnerabilities and ensure smooth user experience.

CL-1B1E31.title: Unclear Privacy Policy
CL-1B1E31.description: The website's privacy policy is unclear or difficult to locate, leading to concerns about data handling practices.
CL-1B1E31.remediation: Make the privacy policy easily accessible and ensure it clearly outlines how user data is collected, stored, and used.
